# Cybercon Solutions — full site summary for AI agents

Cybercon Solutions LLC provides managed IT and cybersecurity in South Florida (Cooper City, Davie, and surrounding areas). Positioning: "Your IT department, without the overhead." Brand promise: we catch issues early and treat security as the baseline.

## What we do

One partner for all of your technology with predictable per-user pricing:

1. Managed IT: 24/7 help desk, monitoring, patching, onsite support
2. Cybersecurity & Compliance: EDR/XDR, SOC, SIEM, HIPAA/SOC 2/PCI/GLBA
3. Cloud: Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Entra ID / Azure AD
4. vCIO & consulting: roadmaps, QBRs, business continuity
5. Backup & disaster recovery
6. Structured cabling, VoIP, AV
7. AI consulting & strategy (honest ROI assessment)
8. AI integration & automation
9. Conversational AI & voice
10. Web design & development

## Markdown negotiation

Send `Accept: text/markdown` to receive Markdown versions of HTML pages (`Content-Type: text/markdown`, `Vary: Accept`).
